title: RTE Odisha Results 2026 - Key Highlights

detail.title: RTE Odisha Results 2026 - Key Highlights
detail.short_info: RTE Odisha Result 2026 Released Today. Check RTE Odisha admission lottery result, selection list, and download the result PDF at rteparadarshi.odisha.gov.in.

content.text: The Odisha Education Department has officially declared the RTE Odisha Round 1 Lottery Results 2026 on 16-03-2026. Students can access their admission status online at the official RTE Odisha portal at rteparadarshi.odisha.gov.in using their registration credentials.

These results determine admission eligibility under the Right to Education Act for the 2026 academic session. Candidates are advised to download and save the result document for future reference and official verification.

RTE Odisha has published the Round 1 Lottery results on its official website for the 2026 academic session. Students can log in using their registration credentials and download the provisional results for academic reference and record-keeping.

The Odisha Education Department has activated the direct link for checking results. Students can instantly view or download their admission status through the official portal using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Check RTE Odisha Results 2026 Online?

content.text: RTE Odisha has made the result download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view results on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website - Go to the official RTE Odisha portal at rteparadarshi.odisha.gov.in.
Find the Results Section - Click on the 'Lottery Result' or 'Admission Result' tab on the homepage.
Select Your Lottery Round - Choose 'Round 1 Lottery Result' from the list of available options.
Enter Your Details - Input your Registration Number and date of birth in the designated fields.
Submit & View - Click the Submit button to view your RTE Odisha Round 1 Lottery Result 2026 on screen.
Download the Admission List - Click Download or Print to save your admission list PDF for official use.
Verify Your Details - Check that your name and application details are correctly reflected on the list.

seo_tags: RTE Odisha 25 percent quota admission result
